channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Saudi Arabia donates 25 tonnes of dates to Tanzania to support Eid celebrations
item.description: Tanzania has received a big donation of 25 tonnes of dates from Saudi Arabia, showing the strong friendship between the two countries. The donation was organised through the King Salman Humanitarian A...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Leads Bilateral Talks in Botswana
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is currently undertaking a state visit to Botswana, which is highlighted by the sixth session of the Botswana and South Africa Bi-National Commission (BNC) in Gaborone. This ...

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Commit to Agricultural Partnership to Strengthen Food Security
item.description: Tanzania and Kenya have decided to work more closely in the field of agriculture so as to increase trade, investment and food security in East Africa. This agreement came after high-level talks held i...

item.title: Google Introduces AI-Powered Search Mode with Interactive Features
item.description: Google has rolled out a major update to its search engine, introducing an 'intelligent search box' powered by its Gemini 3.5 Flash AI model. This new 'AI Mode' allows users to engage in a continuous c...

item.title: GHACOF Forecasts Below-Normal Rainfall in Northern Greater Horn of Africa for June–September 2026
item.description: The Greater Horn of Africa Climate Outlook Forum (GHACOF) has projected that much of the northern Greater Horn of Africa is likely to experience below-normal rainfall during the June–September 2026 se...

item.title: Misan Harriman faces media backlash amid racial and political scrutiny in UK culture
item.description: Misan Harriman, the chair of London's Southbank Centre, is facing an orchestrated media campaign targeting his suitability to lead one of Europe's largest cultural institutions. Renowned as a photogra...

item.title: Former Border Patrol Chief Criticizes Tom Homan Over Immigration Policy
item.description: Tom Homan, President Donald Trump's top immigration adviser, is facing criticism from outgoing Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino. Bovino, recently forced into retirement, claims that Homan's approac...

item.title: Highlighting Inspiring Women Runners in the 40–49 Age Group at Times Internet Half Marathon 2026
item.description: The Times Internet Half Marathon 2026 celebrated remarkable stories of women runners, particularly in the 5K 40–49 female category. The event highlighted fitness, consistency, and personal growth rath...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Shares Boda Boda Rider's Love Messages During TikTok Challenge
item.description: A Kenyan woman named Hellen recently went viral after sharing the flirtatious messages from her boda boda rider on TikTok. The rider confessed that he had fallen deeply in love with her, stating that ...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs target final win to equal 2019/20 points record
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs are set to face Chippa United at Moses Mabhida Stadium on Saturday in the final match of the 2025/26 season. Despite already securing third place in the league, Chiefs right-back Reeve F...

item.title: Pakistan and China Celebrate 75 Years of Strong Diplomatic Relations
item.description: On Thursday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif appreciated the enduring and strong friendship between Pakistan and China during a ceremony held in Islamabad to mark seventy-five years of diplomatic relati...

item.title: Pakistan engages in diplomacy to revive stalled US-Iran peace negotiations
item.description: Pakistan don increase diplomatic moves this week to try and bring US and Iran back to proper peace talks. Six weeks after a fragile ceasefire started, the negotiations dey slow, and oil prices dey cli...

item.title: The Debate Over Indigenous Place Names and Municipal Renaming in B.C.
item.description: The article examines recent controversies in British Columbia regarding the renaming of communities to reflect Indigenous heritage, citing the potential renaming of Okanagan Falls and changes in Powel...

item.title: Todd Blanche Defends Trump in DOJ Matters, Drawing Criticism for Potential Conflicts
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche has recently taken a highly visible role in defending former President Donald Trump, both in public interviews and before Senate committees. Unlike his predecessor...

item.title: Exploring Britain’s Most Unusual Landmarks and Curiosities
item.description: Britain is home to an extraordinary array of unusual landmarks and eccentric sites that reflect the nation’s creativity and whimsical character. From towering sculptures to miniature architectural rep...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Xi Jinping Thought Research Centre at Mwalimu Nyerere Leadership School to Boost Development Cooperation
item.description: On May 20, 2026, Tanzania officially opened a Research Centre for Xi Jinping Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era at the Mwalimu Nyerere Leadership School in Kibaha, Coast R...

item.title: Trump Surgeon General Nominee Criticized for Using Farmland Tax Loophole Despite Not Farming
item.description: Donald Trump's nominee for Surgeon General, Nicole Saphier, a Fox News contributor and radiologist, is under scrutiny for claiming a New Jersey farmland tax break despite not engaging in actual farmin...

item.title: Delhi Experiences Record High Night Temperatures in May, Authorities Issue Orange Heatwave Alert
item.description: Delhi recorded its highest night temperature for the month of May in nearly 14 years, reaching 31.9 degrees Celsius, according to the India Meteorological Department. Safdarjung and Lodhi Road weather...

item.title: Bank of Tanzania Increases Gold Holdings as Key Reserve
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania has stepped up its strategy of using gold as a key part of the country's reserves. As of April 30, 2026, total reserves reached 8.3 trillion Tanzanian shillings, with 5.1 trillion...

item.title: House prosecution panel conducts preparations for VP Sara Duterte's upcoming impeachment trial
item.description: The House Prosecution Panel is actively preparing for the anticipated Senate impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, although no formal schedule has yet been communicated by the Senate Impea...
